tasks.subject: Task 1: Backend â€” PR context package and event routes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose `/api/pr/{pr}/{subproject}/{version}/packages` and `/api/pr/{pr}/{subproject}/{version}/events` so the frontend can fetch packages and events for a specific PR+subproject context.

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/internal/api/handlers.go`
- Modify: `backend/internal/api/server.go`
- Modify: `backend/internal/api/handlers_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `GET /api/pr/pr-92/ppg/17/packages` returns HTTP 200 with a JSON array
- [ ] `GET /api/pr/pr-92/ppg/17/events` returns HTTP 200 with a JSON array
- [ ] The handlers build the OBS prefix as `isv:percona:PR:pr-92:ppg`
- [ ] All existing tests still pass

**Verify:** `cd backend && go test ./internal/api/ -v -run TestPRContext` â†’ all new tests PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/internal/api/handlers.go", "backend/internal/api/server.go", "backend/internal/api/handlers_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test ./internal/api/ -v -run TestPRContext", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET /api/pr/pr-92/ppg/17/packages returns 200 JSON array", "GET /api/pr/pr-92/ppg/17/events returns 200 JSON array", "prefix built as isv:percona:PR:pr-92:ppg", "all existing tests pass"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Frontend composables â€” replace product with apiBase
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Refactor `usePackages` and `useEvents` to accept an `apiBase` URL string instead of a product name, and add dynamic version discovery to `usePackages`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/composables/usePackages.ts`
- Modify: `frontend/src/composables/useEvents.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `usePackages` accepts `apiBase: MaybeRef<string>` and `prefixDepth: MaybeRef<number>`
- [ ] `usePackages` exports `availableVersions: ComputedRef<string[]>`
- [ ] `matchesVersion` uses positional approach (no hardcoded list)
- [ ] `useEvents` accepts `apiBase: MaybeRef<string>`
- [ ] tsc no new errors

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -v "Cannot find module './App.vue'"` â†’ no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/composables/usePackages.ts", "frontend/src/composables/useEvents.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -v \"Cannot find module './App.vue'\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["usePackages accepts apiBase and prefixDepth", "availableVersions computed from project paths", "useEvents accepts apiBase", "tsc no new errors"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Context switcher â€” types, App.vue, ContextBar
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire up the context selector end-to-end: add the `Context` type, update `App.vue` to manage `selectedContext` and `contexts`, and update `ContextBar` to render a dropdown or badge and dynamic version tabs.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/types/api.ts`
- Modify: `frontend/src/App.vue`
- Modify: `frontend/src/components/ContextBar.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Default PPG context works identically to current UI
- [ ] Dropdown appears when PR contexts exist
- [ ] Selecting PR context updates board
- [ ] Version tabs dynamic and hidden when no versions
- [ ] Context switch resets scopes and version
- [ ] PRBoard removed
- [ ] tsc no new errors

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -v "Cannot find module './App.vue'"` â†’ no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/types/api.ts", "frontend/src/App.vue", "frontend/src/components/ContextBar.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -v \"Cannot find module './App.vue'\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PPG default context works identically", "dropdown appears when PR contexts exist", "selecting PR context updates board", "version tabs dynamic", "context switch resets state", "PRBoard removed"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
